authors.author: Ralph Carmichael
Ralph Carmichael
In den Sternen Gottes Werk ich seh

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In the stars His handiwork I see On the wind He speaks with majesty Tho' He ruleth over land and sea What is that to me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I will celebrate nativity For it has a place in history Sure He came to set His people free What is that to me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: 'Til by faith I met Him face to face And I felt the wonder of His grace Then I knew that He was more Than just a God who didn't care That lived away out there And now He walks beside me day by day Ever watching o'er me lest I stray Helping me to find that narrow way He's ev'rything to me
